title: V3Simulate generates wrong result for parameters using chain functions

features.name: chained function calls in localparam
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a chained function call where one function calls another function with arguments that are themselves function calls

features.name: ternary operator in function called by parameter
features.description: Code should include a function with a ternary conditional operator that is called from a localparam context

features.name: nested function calls with same function referenced multiple times
features.description: Code should include a function that references the same helper function multiple times in its body, used in a localparam
